name: Texas TCEQ State-Specific Fields Configuration
description: The EPA Tier2 Submit application is already open. Import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\fhr_corpus_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the facility record for 'Flint Hills Resources Corpus Christi West Refinery'. Go to the 'State Fields' section (which is active because the facility state is TX). Enter the Customer Number (CN) as 'CN603741463', Regulated Entity Number (RN) as 'RN100235266', and TXT2 Number as '987654'. Finally, save and export the updated submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\fhr_corpus_christi_2024.t2s.
